svg.title: Print screen (report and document menu)
svg.desc: Print menu view that lists lodge report actions for staff continuity and organizes guest-document actions alongside operations report actions.

g.text: Choose reports and documents to produce
For the selected day. Batch-print the full set or run one report
Queue a batch for the day, or reprint one by reservation.
Pulls the current bill, folio or confirmation for that one guest.
All reports print at their established paper sizes — footers and wording preserved.
